name: Burmese Veggies with Hot Peppers
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Sunflower oil or vegetable broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or wok, heat the oil over high heat until hot but not smoking.
2. Toss in the vegetables and seasonings and stir-fry for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring 3 to 4 times; the vegetables should be crunchy.
3. Remove from the heat and serve with brown rice or Oriental Amaranth with Purple Cabbage.
